@sigil v0 hybrid
G: min_fix
C: webhook_verify ∧ "300" ∧ edge_ts
P: reject_valid ∧ provider_skew
V: "401" ∧ abs_now_ts ∧ reg_test
A: widen_window ∧ add_skew ∧ reg_test

[AUDIT]
Goal: min_fix.
Constraints: webhook_verify and "300" and edge_ts.
Plan: reject_valid and provider_skew.
Verify: "401" and abs_now_ts and reg_test.
Answer target: widen_window and add_skew and reg_test.

@sigil v0 hybrid

P: "overdue⇒402" ∧ grace_"24h" ∧ idempotent_charge

@sigil v0 hybrid

@sigil v0 hybrid

Answer target: add_input_validation and use_path_resolve and whitelist_check.

@sigil v0 hybrid

@sigil v0 hybrid
